name: Medium Ceramic Mushroom Outdoor Garden Figurine - Threshold™
description:
Add a fun touch to your outdoor decor with this Ceramic Mushroom Garden Figurine from Threshold™. This ceramic garden decor showcases a figural mushroom with a painted look on the top in a glossy finish. Featuring a flat base for easy placement on any flat surface, it makes a great option for displaying on your front porch or in your garden along with other decorative pieces to liven up the space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
